violations.description: Suite is forced to serial execution, indicating inter-test dependency and reduced isolation.
violations.suggestion: Split stateful scenarios into isolated setup/teardown blocks so tests can run in parallel.

violations.description: E2E automate suite is also pinned to serial mode, increasing coupling between test cases.
violations.suggestion: Use per-test context factories and cleanup hooks to remove ordering constraints.

violations.description: Context factories produce reusable IDs and domain entities that may overlap across concurrent workers.
violations.suggestion: Generate unique per-test entity keys or enforce cleanup contracts in fixtures.

recommendations: Remove serial mode from suites where state can be made independent.
Promote unique-per-test context generation in story fixtures.
Add explicit teardown assertions for entities created during dispatch/webhook flows.
summary: Isolation needs improvement due to serial-mode dependency and shared context reuse patterns.
